description_long: This object is a decorative arrangement of white flowers with subtle hints of pink, set in a tall, rectangular, dark woven basket. The flowers have delicate, slightly ruffled petals and are clustered together, with some blooms more open than others. The green stems and elongated, lanceolate leaves spill over the edges of the basket, giving the arrangement a lush and natural appearance. The basket itself has a textured, woven pattern, suggesting it is made from a synthetic or natural fiber. The overall look is elegant and suitable for placement in urban environments such as sidewalks, building entrances, or parks. The flowers appear artificial, likely made from fabric or plastic, designed to mimic real blooms.
description: A tall, dark woven basket holds a lush arrangement of white and pink artificial flowers with green stems and lanceolate leaves. The display is elegant and realistic, ideal for urban decorative use.
description_view_0: The front view shows the basket's woven texture and a dense cluster of white flowers with visible pink centers and green leaves spilling forward.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the basket and reveals more of the flower cluster, with petals and leaves extending outward and overlapping.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the basket and the less dense arrangement of flowers, with more visible stems and fewer blooms facing this direction.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite side of the basket, with leaves and flowers arching outward, and the woven texture of the basket is prominent.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with each flower displaying a whorled pattern and some overlapping of petals, creating a layered and symmetrical appearance.
